case_title: APACHETA CORPORATION, A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION VS. STEVEN HIGGINS

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-08-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE A CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT PRIOR TO THE CASE MANAGEMENT. THE FEB-05-2010 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF DEC-31-2009 CONTINUED TO FEB-05-2010 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR THE SUBMISSION OF CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENTS. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
